s: In 2015, Cory Mazzoni suited up for SDP as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 20.770, WHIP 3.230, SO 8, WAR -0.100.
In 2017, Cory Mazzoni suited up for SDP as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 13.500, WHIP 2.630, SO 4, WAR -0.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (SDP -> CHC).
In 2018, Cory Mazzoni suited up for CHC as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 1.040, WHIP 1.150, SO 7, WAR 0.100. Notable context: Joined CHC.
